use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation bars and headers
Showing author avatars in blog posts, comments, and reviews
Rendering user avatars in social media feeds and messaging interfaces
Displaying team member or employee avatars on about and contact pages
Showing user thumbnails in dashboard sidebars and user lists
ai_summary: A foundational avatar component built on Radix UI primitives that displays user profile images with automatic fallback to initials when images fail to load. The component provides three composable parts: Avatar (root container), AvatarImage (the image element), and AvatarFallback (initials display on error). Clean, minimalist styling makes it suitable for any application requiring user representation, from dashboards to social platforms.
